$description: Core primitives for Clínica Serrano — raw values with no semantic meaning. Layer 1 of 3 (core → semantic → components/templates). Values marked 'provisional' are estimated from Instagram exports and need confirmation against original source files.

greige.$description: Warm greige — base for the default surface mode. Provisional, sample from source.

cream-light.$description: Light cream — base for the announcement surface mode. Provisional.

cream-warm.$description: Warm off-white. Used as foreground on greige surfaces. Never pure white. Provisional.

charcoal.$description: Near-black with slight warmth. Foreground on cream surfaces. Not pure #000. Provisional.

navy.$description: Deep navy. Auxiliary brand color, observed only on physical textiles (towels). Not in use on digital surfaces. Provisional.

wordmark-serif.$description: Used only inside the SERRANO wordmark. Likely Bodoni Moda / GT Super / Canela / Didot. Confirm with original designer.

display-sans.$description: Single sans family used for headlines, body, the CLÍNICA portion of the wordmark, and announcement covers. Likely TWK Lausanne / PP Editorial New / Söhne / Migra. Confirm with original designer. See CHANGELOG.md ADR-0002 — there is no second sans family.

size.$description: Sizes expressed as percentages of canvas height (cqh) for Instagram, since absolute px values do not survive across canvas sizes. Use these via container queries on web.

headline.$description: Statement headline (deep-dive body slides, announcement closing).

loose.$description: Used on the CLÍNICA portion of the wordmark.

space.$description: Layout spacing primitives, expressed as percentages of the shorter canvas dimension (cqi).

edge-margin.$description: Standard safe-area margin from canvas edges.

headline-to-body.$description: Gap from headline baseline to body, ~one headline line-height.

pill.$description: Full pill radius for CTA shapes.

motion.$description: The brand uses no motion in static surfaces. Animation tokens reserved for future web/Reels work.
